title: Commercial office, Type V-B, NON-sprinklered per-story area over the Group B limit
notes: Tests IBC Table 506.2 hard fail. Group B / Type V-B NS tabular allowable is 9,000 sf. 12,000 sf NON-sprinklered exceeds it with no sprinkler increase available, so the engine asserts a hard violation (the sprinklered twin office-vb-area-violation.json warns for the 506.2 S1 increase math instead). This is the first true-positive case for COM-AREA-ALLOWABLE, which previously had only pass/warn coverage.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: V-B
Stories: 1
Building height: 18 ft
Per-story area: 12,000 sf
Non-sprinklered
Design occupant load: 60
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical: 400 A main breaker
EXIT 1 (front). EXIT 2 (rear).
WC 4 LAV 4.

ground_truth.rationale: 12,000 sf per story exceeds the 9,000 sf NS tabular allowable for Group B / Type V-B (Table 506.2); non-sprinklered, so no 506.2 sprinkler increase is available.
1 story within the B/V-B 2-story NS limit (Table 504.4)
18 ft within the 40 ft NS limit for Type V-B (Table 504.3)
18 ft is below the 75 ft high-rise threshold
OL 60 Group B needs 3 WC / 2 lav; 4 / 4 provided
